collinear In The Wild

Source: vignettes/articles/collinear_in_the_wild.Rmd
collinear_in_the_wild.Rmd

Summary

This article lists known applications of the R package collinear found in the literature.

This page is maintained by hand and may be incomplete. If you’ve used collinear in a publication, talk, or blog post and would like it listed here, please open an issue at the package repository. # References (APA 7th Edition)

Research Papers

2026

Stachura, G., & Ustrnul, Z. (2026). Identification and correction of snow depth bias in ERA5 datasets over Central Europe using machine learning. The Cryosphere, 20(4), 2295–2315. https://doi.org/10.5194/tc-20-2295-2026

Villar, D. A., Clark-Ginsberg, A., & Tisherman, R. (2026). Decadal predictions of future habitat favourability of the European green crab (Carcinus maenas) on the Pacific Coast of North America. Hydrobiologia. https://doi.org/10.1007/s10750-026-06149-4

Wu, L., Wang, Q., Shang, Z., Chen, H., Deng, A., Song, Z., Zheng, C., & Zhang, W. (2026). Straw return boosts N₂O emissions primarily during the pre-jointing stage in winter wheat fields: A meta-analysis. Agriculture, Ecosystems & Environment, 399, 110175. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.agee.2025.110175

Zengeya, F. M., Jafter, O., Rusike, T., Mufandaedza, E., Rwasoka, D. T., & Gwitira, I. (2026). Coupling ensemble of small models with UAV-derived structural and textural metrics to predict occurrence of an invasive alien plant in an urban woodland reserve. Applied Geomatics, 18, 19. https://doi.org/10.1007/s12518-025-00672-0

2025

Georgopoulou, E., Kougioumoutzis, K., & Simaiakis, S. M. (2025). The impact of climate and land use change on Greek centipede biodiversity and conservation. Land, 14(8), 1685. https://doi.org/10.3390/land14081685

Kougioumoutzis, K., Kokkoris, I. P., Trigas, P., Strid, A., & Dimopoulos, P. (2025). Projected impacts of climate and land use change on endemic plant distributions in a Mediterranean island hotspot: The case of Evvia (Aegean, Greece). Climate, 13(5), 100. https://doi.org/10.3390/cli13050100

Savvides, A. M., Themistokleous, G., Philippou, K., Panagiotou, M., & Omirou, M. (2025). Exploratory flux pulses and emerging trade-offs in a semi-arid lettuce experiment: Plant and nitrogen effects on GHG and NH₃ emissions. Horticulturae, 11(11), 1287. https://doi.org/10.3390/horticulturae11111287

Stachura, G., & Ustrnul, Z. (2025). Identification and correction of snow depth bias in ERA5 datasets over Central Europe using machine learning [Preprint]. EGUsphere. https://doi.org/10.5194/egusphere-2025-5084

Stefanidis, A., Kougioumoutzis, K., Zografou, K., Fotiadis, G., Tzortzakaki, O., Willemse, L., & Kati, V. (2025). Mitigating the extinction risk of globally threatened and endemic mountainous Orthoptera species: Parnassiana parnassica and Oropodisma parnassica. Insect Conservation and Diversity, 18(1), 54–68. https://doi.org/10.1111/icad.12784

Stefanidis, A., Kougioumoutzis, K., Zografou, K., Fotiadis, G., Willemse, L., Tzortzakaki, O., & Kati, V. (2025). Distribution patterns and habitat preferences of five globally threatened and endemic montane Orthoptera (Parnassiana and Oropodisma). Ecologies, 6(1), 5. https://doi.org/10.3390/ecologies6010005

Wang, J., Wang, B., Wang, D., Yu, Y., Zhao, Y., & Xu, P. (2025). Trade-off strategies between drought resistance and growth rate of dominant tree species in karst forests within heterogeneous habitats. Scientific Reports, 15, 26381. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-025-97550-x

Zhang, F., Hu, B., Meng, L., Pang, M., Chen, Y., Song, W., Feng, Y., & Ma, Y. (2025). Appropriate biochar application methods can simultaneously mitigate Cd concentrations in different parts of soil and crops: A meta-analysis. Soil Use and Management, 41, e70044. https://doi.org/10.1111/sum.70044

2024

Simons, A. L., Baez, H., Acharya-Patel, N., Helbing, C. C., Jeffers, J., Stanford, J., & Meyer, R. S. (2024). TerraDactyl: A tool for connecting environmental data to when and where. Ecological Informatics, 84, 102974. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ecoinf.2024.102974
